settings.title: How to Keep Your Color From Fading So Fast
settings.excerpt: Hot water and the wrong shampoo are quietly stripping the color you paid for.
settings.body:
Clients who color often ask why it dulls within weeks. A few easy changes keep it vivid far longer.

Turn the water down. Hot water opens the hair and lets color rinse away. Cooler water at the end seals it in.

Wait before the first wash. Give fresh color a couple of days to set before shampooing.

Skip the harsh shampoo. Anything with sulphates strips pigment. A gentle, color-safe formula makes a real difference, and we are happy to point you to one.
